name: link
description: A standalone styled anchor (v-next): the navigation affordance (distinct from button's action affordance). Always renders <a>; when disabled, href is smart-dropped and aria-disabled is set. external=true adds target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer + sr-only hint + inline Unicode glyph (no icon partial dependency). Variant (default|muted|destructive|ghost) drives colour via tokens; size (sm|md|lg|inherit) drives font size. Extra attributes via trusted `attrs` + safe-escaped `dataAttrs`. Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012), zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the link partial to your JTE root at lievit/link.jte, reached as @template.lievit.link(href="...", content=@`...`). v-next: always a real <a>; disabled drops href + sets aria-disabled; external=true opens in new tab with sr-only hint and Unicode glyph; variant (default|muted|destructive|ghost); size (inherit|sm|md|lg); download param; ariaLabel; dataAttrs for safe per-row data. The source is yours: edit freely.
